hero.description: Experience automotive excellence. Choose from our premium luxury car collection with unmatched comfort and performance.

features.description: We do more than car rentals — we provide an experience tailored to the highest international standards.

protection.title: Premium Protection
protection.description: Full insurance coverage included with every rental for complete peace of mind.

support24.title: 24/7 Availability
support24.description: Round-the-clock services with flexible pickup and drop-off times.

payment.title: Secure Payment
payment.description: Multiple payment options with bank-level security encryption.

delivery.title: Location Delivery
delivery.description: Multiple delivery points across the city, including airport terminals.

concierge.title: Dedicated Service
concierge.description: Personal concierge assistance for your special requests.

premium.title: Premium Cars
premium.description: A curated collection of the world's finest luxury vehicles.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Just four simple steps to get your dream car

browse.title: Browse & Choose
browse.description: Explore our premium fleet and choose the perfect car for your needs.

dates.title: Select Dates
dates.description: Choose your pickup and return dates with our flexible booking system.

booking.title: Secure Booking
booking.description: Complete your reservation through our secure payment process.

drive.title: Pick Up & Drive
drive.description: Get your keys and enjoy an unforgettable driving experience.

cta.description: Join thousands of happy customers who have enjoyed our premium fleet and exceptional service.

about.heroDescription: Since 2016, we have delivered the best car rental experience with a fleet of the world's finest vehicles and 24/7 support.
about.storyTitle1: From a Dream to the Largest
about.storyParagraph1: Our company started in 2016 with 15 cars and a small team of five people. Our goal was simple: provide the best luxury car rental experience.
about.storyParagraph2: Today, with more than 500 luxury vehicles and thousands of satisfied customers, we are recognized as a leader in the luxury car rental industry.

security.title: Trust & Security
security.description: All our vehicles are regularly inspected and fully insured.

delivery.title: On-Time Delivery
delivery.description: Your vehicle will always be ready at your chosen time and location.

quality.title: Exceptional Quality
quality.description: Our fleet includes the world's top luxury brands.

team.title: Professional Team
team.description: Our specialists are always ready to assist and guide you.

about.contactDescription: We are here for all your questions
about.ctaDescription: Choose from over 500 luxury cars and book today.

contact.title: How Can We Help?
contact.description: Our team is ready to answer your questions and solve your problems.
contact.subject: Subject *

info.hoursValue: Saturday to Thursday, 8 AM to 8 PM

faq.q1: How can I book a car?
faq.a1: Select your preferred car, choose the dates, and click the booking button.
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel up to 24 hours before your booking starts.
faq.a3: A valid driving license and national ID or passport are required.
faq.a4: Yes, free delivery is available for bookings longer than 3 days.
